roa.docketEntryComment: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS HUNG COUNTS(MARIN MOTION) FILED
DEFENDANT PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS & MOTIONS IN LIMINE FILED
PUB DEF MOTION FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING FILED

/CAL:MOTION FOR DISMISSAL/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE COUNSEL MOTION TO DISMISS THE REMAINING COUNT IN THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1385 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/STATES/SATERM/
/CAL:TRIAL, COUNT 1, DEF MOT TO DISMISS/X:DEFENDANT 2 HR TSB/LDTR:08-17-17/CONTD:TRIAL AND MARIN COUNTY MOTION/X:TBH BY JUDGE ROGER CHAN/X:DEFENDANT2 HOUR TELEPHONE STANDBY/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL - JURY DELIBERATIONS & VERDICT/X: JURY IS UNABLE TO REACHA VERDICT ON COUNT 1/X: COURT DECLARES A MISTRIAL ON COUNT 1/OR/X:AS CONDITIONS OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT USE OR POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS AND THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT KNOWINGLY POSSESS ANY FIREARM OR ANY OTHER DANGEROUS OR DEADLY WEAPON,/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:ANY CLEARLY IDENTIFIED SAN FRANCISCO PARK AND RECREATION EMPLOYEE/SAORD4:25 YARDS/SA2:ANY SAN FRANCISCO PARK AND RECREATION  PERSONAL PROPERTY INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO VEHICLES/SAORD4:50 FEET/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:TO RESET FOR TRIAL ON COUNT 1/DOP/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X: THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF ACQUITTAL OF COUNT(S) 1 & 2 PURSUANT TO PC1118,1,/X:THE PEOPLE OPPOSE THE MOTION,/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/CTORD: THAT A JUDGMENT OF ACQUITTAL BE ENTERED ON COUNTS2/CONTD:JURY TRIAL - JURY DELIBERATIONS/DOP/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATIONS/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL/SHER/BAIL:10,000/NTW/LDTR:07-19-17/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:06-23-17//CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/
/TN  PAUL LEO HUGES/CAL  ARRAIGNMENT/PD/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/ACM/SA2: 3601 LYONSTREET, SF/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/CONTD: TO SET TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:TRAIL & MOTION TO DISMISS TBH BY JUDGE R CHAN/LDTR:08-17-17/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 20/TRANS 20:FORTHWITH FOR MOTION TO DISMISS TBH AT 3:30PM/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL MADE AN ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS,/ARG&SUB/NTW/LDTR:08-17-17/CONTD:RE-TRIAL/DEF:IS PLACED ON A 2 HOURS STANDBY/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL - PRETRIAL MOTIONS & JURY INSTRUCTIONS/CONTD:JURY TRIAL -OPENING STATMENTS/DOP/TEXT:JURY SWORN/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS SCHEDULING/CONTD:JURY TRIAL -PRETRIAL MOTIONS & JURY SELECTIONS/DOP/
